titles.title: At the foot of the cross

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v2 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: At the foot of the cross Where grace and suffering meet You have shown me your love Through the judgment you received

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And you've won my heart And you've won my heart, now I can

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Trade these ashes in for beauty And wear forgiveness like a crown Coming to kiss the feet of mercy I lay every burden down at the foot of the cross

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: At the foot of the cross Where I am made complete You have given me life Through the death you bore for me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And wear forgiveness like a crown Coming to kiss the feet of mercy I lay every burden down at the foot of the cross

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Trade these ashes in for beauty And wear forgiveness like a crown Coming to kiss the feet of mercy I lay every burden down

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I trade these ashes in for beauty And wear forgiveness like a crown Coming to kiss the feet of mercy I lay every burden down

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I lay every burden down, every burden I lay every burden down At the foot of the cross At the foot of the cross At the foot of the cross At the foot of the cross
